title: Jeffery Fawcett
compiled_truth: Jeffery Fawcett is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2001-10-30), Jeffery Fawcett sent 173 and received 1091 emails, totalling 1264 interactions. Top correspondents: [Susan Scott](people/susan-scott) (91), [Steven Harris](people/steven-harris) (88), [Kevin Hyatt](people/kevin-hyatt) (80), [Jeff Dasovich](people/jeff-dasovich) (69), [Lorraine Lindberg](people/lorraine-lindberg) (57). Mailbox folders observed: deleted_items, inbox, market_intel, projects, rm_science_review, tw.
